creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
John Smith wrote:
> I download your i386 ISO's from multiple ftp sites, and
> all had bad md5 checksums. Is this normal?
> 
> Thanks,
> 
> John Smith 

Hello John, we recently verified the main ftp
servers and these were found to be consistent.

Where did you spot this behaviour? What versions
did you download? Are you sure that there are
no network glitches which could lead to the same
behaviour (I had this a couple of times, on my
third attempt the downloaded file was OK).

Thanks,
remko

-- 
Kind regards,

      Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
      FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

      /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
